name: codesync
description: One-way folder mirror for AI context — source to sync folder
author: Code Sync

scripts.dist: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:dir: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win dir --config electron-builder.yml
